About This Property

A rare opportunity to own a stylish, fully furnished 1-bedroom apartment in the heart of Dubai Marina. This 864 sq.ft. residence has been thoughtfully upgraded with premium finishes throughout — sleek wood-slat feature walls, designer furnishings, a marble-effect kitchen, and a hotel-quality master suite.

The open-plan living and dining area seats six and is anchored by a statement curved navy sofa and curated pop-art pieces. The fully fitted kitchen includes a dishwasher, washing machine, oven with hob, fridge, microwave and toaster — move-in ready from day one. Chiller-free status delivers significant annual savings versus comparable units.

ℹ️ Layout note: This unit has no balcony — all space is maximised internally, resulting in a larger, more functional floor plan than typical 1BR units in the building.
